title: Identifying a thermally-throttled node from job performance telemetry
query_text: One of the compute nodes appears to be running jobs significantly slower than its peers. Using telemetry, identify which node is degraded and diagnose the hardware cause.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: node03 is thermally throttling due to a blocked cooling duct. CPU frequency is reduced by 40% causing jobs to run ~30% slower. The telemetry shows anomalously low CPU frequency on node03 compared to peers. Recommended action: drain node03 and schedule cooling duct inspection.
